{{CargoRelic
|name=Limited Edition Vinyl Record
|class_id=20627
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=During the band's practice sessions, the manager secretly recorded those still youthful but vibrant voices and gifted them to the band members as a keepsake, a memory of these unforgettable times!
|fame=14
|art=31
|fth=19
|civ=17
|tech=14
|ss1=Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +6m<br>Per 50k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +3<br>Relic Points: 1500000/1500000
|ss2=Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +12m<br>Per 50k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +4<br>Relic Points: 1500000/1500000
|ss3=Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +18m<br>Per 50k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +5<br>Relic Points: 1500000/1500000
|ss4=Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +18m<br>Per 50k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +5<br>Relic Points: 1500000/1500000
|ss7=Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +18m<br>Per 50k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +5<br>Relic Points: 1500000/1500000<br> (Awakened)
}}
